beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Real Oviedo have won four of their last six LaLiga matches against Elche, one more victory than they managed in their previous 13 top-flight meetings. Following their 1-0 victory at the Martínez Valero in September, Elche have the opportunity to complete a league double over Real Oviedo for only the second time in their history, having previously done so in the 1964/65 campaign.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Osasuna vs Sevilla - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Osasuna vs Sevilla - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Osasuna are unbeaten in their last four home LaLiga matches against Sevilla, their longest such run against the Andalusian side in the competition since May 2009. Sevilla FC ended their longest winless streak against Osasuna in LaLiga history  with their 1-0 victory in November 2025; they have not won consecutive league matches against them since October 2021.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Villarreal vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Villarreal vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Villarreal have won their last four home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their longest winning streak at home against the Galician side in the competition's history. Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Villarreal ; they have not gone three consecutive league games without defeat against the Yellow Submarine since November 2019.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Espanyol vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Espanyol vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Espanyol have lost only two of their last 14 LaLiga matches against Levante, having lost five of their previous six, and only against Celta de Vigo  have they drawn more games than against the Granotas in the competition since 2013/14. At home, Espanyol have lost only two of their 15 LaLiga meetings with Levante, although they have conceded exactly three goals in each of the last two.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Qatar Sc vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Qatar Sc vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Rennes vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Rennes vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: This will be the 90th Ligue 1 match between Rennes and Nantes. FC Nantes are the opponents against whom Rennes have won the most often in the top-flight since the start of the 21st century. Rennes have won each of their last seven home games against Nantes in all competitions, as many as they had in their previous 21 such matches.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Lorient vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Lorient vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Both Lorient and Strasbourg have four wins each against each other in Ligue 1, along with five draws. Lorient have lost only nine of their 30 Ligue 1 matches this season. If they avoid defeat here, they are guaranteed to record their lowest number of losses in a top-flight campaign since 2009-10, when they lost 12 of their 38 matches.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Real Betis vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Real Betis vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Real Betis are unbeaten in their last three LaLiga home games against Real Madrid, their longest such run against Los Blancos in the competition since October 2004. Real Madrid have picked up points in nine of their last 11 LaLiga away games against Real Betis, though they lost their most recent visit 2-1 in March 2025. Real Madrid have not lost consecutive away league games against Los Verdiblancos since February 1999.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Deportivo Alaves vs Mallorca - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Deportivo Alaves vs Mallorca - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Deportivo Alavés are unbeaten in their last two home LaLiga games against Mallorca  and could remain undefeated in three consecutive home matches against them for the first time in the top flight. Following their 1-0 victory at Son Moix in September 2025, RCD Mallorca are looking to complete a league double over Alavés for the third time in their history, having previously done so in the 2000/01 and 2021/22 campaigns.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Getafe vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Getafe vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Getafe CF have won only one of their last 26 LaLiga matches against Barcelona, a 1-0 victory in October 2020, and have failed to score in seven of their last eight league meetings with the Blaugrana. FC Barcelona are winless in their last five away LaLiga matches against Getafe, their longest ever winless run away to the Azulones in the competition and their current longest away winless streak against any opponent in the league.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Valencia  vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Valencia  vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Valencia CF have won only one of their last six LaLiga matches against Girona  – a 2-0 victory in September 2024 – having won four of their first five meetings in the competition. Girona FC have not drawn any of their five away LaLiga matches against Valencia, their most away games against any opponent in the top flight without a single draw.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 home league games against Athletic Club  since a 0-2 defeat in January 2011 at the Vicente Calderón; it's their longest home unbeaten run against the Basque side in LaLiga history. Following their 1-0 win at San Mamés in December 2025, Athletic Club are looking to win back-to-back LaLiga games against Atlético de Madrid for the first time since October 2011, and for the first time in the same league season since 1999/2000 under Luis Fernández.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Universidad Central (VEN) vs Rosario Central (ARG) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD3
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Universidad Central (VEN) vs Rosario Central (ARG) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD3
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Rayo Vallecano are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Real Sociedad  since a 2-1 defeat in April 2023; this is their longest unbeaten run against the Basque side in their top-flight history. Real Sociedad have picked up points in each of their last seven away LaLiga matches against Rayo Vallecano, their longest unbeaten run away from home against the Madrid side in the top-flight, and their longest ongoing unbeaten away streak against any opponent in the competition.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Real Oviedo have won four of their last six LaLiga matches against Elche, one more victory than they managed in their previous 13 top-flight meetings. Following their 1-0 victory at the Martínez Valero in September, Elche have the opportunity to complete a league double over Real Oviedo for only the second time in their history, having previously done so in the 1964/65 campaign.

beIN SPORTS 2.title: Liverpool vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League home games against Crystal Palace, having won five in a row against them at Anfield before this.
